title: EmitterFamily
description: Catalog entry describing wavelength band, emissivity, selectivity, temperature range, and evidence state of a reject or conversion-coupled emitter concept. Governed by model-extension-2-spec-v0.2.1 §8. Output-driving fields: wavelength_band_*, nominal_emissivity, nominal_selectivity_fraction, temperature_*. Metadata-only fields: tpv_compatibility_class, notes[].

wavelength_band_min_um.description: Lower bound of emitter active wavelength band in micrometers. Output-driving per §8.4.

wavelength_band_nominal_um.description: Nominal center wavelength in micrometers. Output-driving per §8.4.

wavelength_band_max_um.description: Upper bound of emitter active wavelength band in micrometers. Output-driving per §8.4.

nominal_emissivity.description: Nominal emissivity [dimensionless, 0–1]. Output-driving per §8.4. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §8.3.

nominal_selectivity_fraction.description: Nominal fraction of emission concentrated in target band [dimensionless, 0–1]. Output-driving per §8.4. Constraint: 0 <= value <= 1 per §8.3.

temperature_min_k.description: Minimum operating temperature in Kelvin. Output-driving per §8.4. Constraint: min < nominal < max per §8.3.

temperature_nominal_k.description: Nominal operating temperature in Kelvin. Output-driving per §8.4.

temperature_max_k.description: Maximum operating temperature in Kelvin. Output-driving per §8.4.

tpv_compatibility_class.description: TPV cell compatibility class descriptor. Metadata-only per §8.4.

output_effect_class.description: Declared output effect of this catalog entry per spec §12.4.

default_enabled_for_exploration.description: Whether this entry is pre-selected for exploratory comparison by default.

research_required.description: True if provenance_class is placeholder or hypothesis_only per spec §12.5.
